examples.english: Take these books, I hope they will be useful to you.

senses.gloss: to profit, to benefit; to be conducive to health
to profit, to benefit; to be effective as an antidote

examples.text:
a. 965 CE, Al-Mutanabbi
وَمِنَ الْعَدَاوَةِ مَا يَنَالُكَ نَفْعُهُ / وَمِنَ الصَّدَاقَةِ مَا يَضُرُّ وَيُؤْلِمُ
wamina l-ʕadāwati mā yanāluka nafʕuhu / wamina ṣ-ṣadāqati mā yaḍurru wayuʔlimu
